title: Create the ability to batch transfer automations on a per board basis
excerpt:
Description
Currently you can only batch transfer automations on an account/user level. I am currently having to go through 15 individual boards and transfer automations one-by-one. Having a batch select and transfer fea…

posts.author: Stacey_Telfer (Stacey Telfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently you can only batch transfer automations on an account/user level. I am currently having to go through 15 individual boards and transfer automations one-by-one. Having a batch select and transfer feature would save a lot of time.

What are you trying to achieve

Time saving and improved efficiencies

posts.author: arjumehta (Arju)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would allow users to transfer multiple automations from one board to another in a single action. It would save time by eliminating the need to recreate or move automations individually. By selecting a board and choosing the desired automations, users could quickly duplicate or migrate them, improving workflow efficiency and consistency across projects and teams.

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Totally agree with this. When you have multiple boards running similar workflows, transferring automations one by one becomes really time-consuming. A batch transfer option on a per-board basis would definitely make administration much easier and reduce manual work.

It’s interesting how many teams are now focusing on improving workflow efficiency and automation across tools. I recently read something about AI call agents and business process automation that touched on how organizations are trying to reduce repetitive tasks in their processes — which is basically the same idea behind a feature like this.
